privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.thirdPartyBody: Teammate and opponent data comes from Supercell public API for aggregate analytics.
privacy.retentionBody: Battles are preserved indefinitely, even after cancellation.
privacy.gdprBody: Request data export or deletion at privacy@brawlvision.com.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use localStorage and Supabase Auth cookies. AdSense sets ad cookies for free users.
privacy.disclaimerBody: BrawlVision is not affiliated with Supercell Oy. Brawl Stars is a trademark of Supercell.
